stories.title: Tom Kim Wins Genesis Scottish Open — Ends Near Three-Year Drought

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tom Kim ended a near three-year PGA Tour victory drought Sunday.

-17, final-round 64, two-shot win over Min Woo Lee at the Scottish Open.

The first text he received after the win? Tiger Woods.

Emotion on the 18th green was real. 🏆

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Scottish Open final leaderboard:

Tom Kim: -17 ✅
Min Woo Lee: -15
MacIntyre / Fitzpatrick / Nakajima / Keefer: -13 (T3)
Rory McIlroy: T7 (-11)

Kim's clinching shot: 203 yards to 6 feet on the 16th.

What a week at the Renaissance Club.

article.headline: Tom Kim Ends Three-Year Drought With Scottish Open Win — Tiger Woods Sent the First Text

stories.title: Haeran Ryu Wins Evian Championship — Two Majors in Three Weeks

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Haeran Ryu wins the Evian Championship. Two majors in three weeks.

Brooke Henderson shot a final-round 64 — including an eagle on 18 — to force a playoff.

Ryu birdied the first playoff hole to win.

She's the most dominant player in women's golf right now.

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Haeran Ryu shot a 60 in the third round of the Evian Championship.

That's the lowest round ever recorded in a major championship — men's or women's.

She won the KPMG three weeks ago. She just won the Evian.

What are we watching? 👏

article.headline: Haeran Ryu Wins the Evian Championship in a Playoff — Her Second Major in Three Weeks

stories.title: Open Championship Preview — Practice Rounds Begin at Royal Birkdale Today

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The Open Championship starts Thursday.

Royal Birkdale. 156 players. Scheffler and McIlroy co-favorites.

The Last-Chance Qualifier is happening today at Birkdale for the final spots in the field.

The final major of 2026 is here.

#TheOpen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Three days until The Open.

Scheffler arrives as defending champion after missing the cut at the Scottish Open.

McIlroy arrives with a final-round 64 at the Scottish in his legs.

The Claret Jug winner is announced Sunday. It begins Thursday.

#TheOpen #RoyalBirkdale

article.headline: The Open Championship Arrives at Royal Birkdale: Three Days Until the Claret Jug Hunt Begins

stories.title: MacIntyre's T3 — Timely Result Ahead of Birkdale

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Bob MacIntyre finished T3 at the Scottish Open at -13.

He suffered four bogeys in a seven-hole stretch but rallied. His verdict on Birkdale?

"No reason why I can't compete."

The Scotsman heads to the Open with confidence.

#TheOpen

article.headline: MacIntyre Finishes T3 at Scottish Open — "No Reason Why I Can't Compete" at Birkdale

stories.title: LIV Golf Files WARN Act Notices — $400M Funding Gap Puts Season at Risk

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf filed WARN Act layoff notices for US and UK staff around July 8.

The league says nothing has changed yet — but PIF is ending funding after 2026, and LIV still needs ~$400M to finish the season.

The final two events could be at risk.

article.headline: LIV Golf's Crisis Is Now Official: WARN Act Notices Filed, $400M Gap Could End the Season Early
